title: Repo scaffold + CI: schema-validation, exclusion-list, cost-ceiling, readability, no-telemetry audit
context: oer-science-labs needs a pnpm workspace, CI pipeline, and validation tooling that enforce the content schema, the hard exclusion list, per-guide cost ceilings, readability targets, and the zero-telemetry/zero-PII requirement before any guide or site work begins. Defense in depth for no-telemetry requires both a static CI audit and a runtime network-interception E2E (a static grep alone does not pass). This task depends on data-003 (schema must exist before CI can validate against it).
objective: Scaffold the pnpm monorepo, configure TypeScript/ESM, set up the CI pipeline (lint, typecheck, unit, schema-validation, exclusion-list check, cost-ceiling check, readability check, no-telemetry audit, offline E2E), and wire the build-time validator that enforces the guide schema. The CI pipeline must fail on any lint/type/unit/schema error, any exclusion-list hit, any guide over its cost ceiling, any readability miss for the guide's grade band, and any unexpected outbound network request detected by the runtime E2E. The no-telemetry check must use defense in depth: a static tracker/PII audit plus a runtime network-interception E2E that fails on any unexpected outbound request, with CSP connect-src 'none' asserted.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm workspace with TypeScript/ESM is scaffolded; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass on the empty/starter codebase
CI fails on lint, typecheck, or unit-test errors
CI fails on schema-validation errors (any guide not conforming to the schema from data-003 blocks merge)
CI fails when a guide trips the hard exclusion list (any keyword or activity pattern from the exclusion list in arch-002 causes a CI failure)
CI fails when a guide's estTotalCost exceeds its declared per-guide cost ceiling
CI fails when a guide's measured readingLevel falls outside the target range for its grade band

CI no-telemetry check uses defense in depth: a static grep/audit for known tracker patterns and PII field names, PLUS a runtime Playwright network-interception E2E that fails the build on any unexpected outbound request; CSP connect-src 'none' is asserted and tested
CI fails on offline E2E failure (the static site must load and serve guides after first visit with no network)
MIT license file and CC-BY-4.0 content license notice are in place
output: A pull request adding the pnpm monorepo scaffold, TypeScript/ESM configuration, and full CI pipeline (schema-validation, exclusion-list, cost-ceiling, readability, no-telemetry defense-in-depth, offline E2E) to the oer-science-labs repository.
